StudentModules.Title: Timetable
StudentModules.Description: Daily and weekly class schedule with subject, teacher, room, and period timings.

StudentModules.Title: Curriculum
StudentModules.Description: Class-wise syllabus, lesson plan, subjects, learning outcomes, and academic calendar.

StudentModules.Title: Study Content
StudentModules.Description: Digital academic content for students, including notes, worksheets, assignments, and reference material.

StudentModules.Title: Attendance and Progress
StudentModules.Description: Attendance percentage, performance summaries, teacher remarks, and parent-visible progress updates.

StudentModules.Title: School Details
StudentModules.Description: Student profile, fee status, notices, transport details, and contact information.
